/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/yolomaster_edge.dir/src/common.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yolomaster_edge.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yolomaster_edge.dir/src/stb_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yolomaster_edge.dir/src/ort_backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yolomaster_edge.dir/src/ncnn_backend.cpp.o -o yolomaster_edge  -Wl,-rpath,/data/yolo-master-edge/third_party/onnxruntime/lib:/data/yolo-master-edge/cpp/../third_party/ncnn/lib:/data/yolo-master-edge/third_party/ncnn/lib /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.5.4d /data/yolo-master-edge/third_party/onnxruntime/lib/libonnxruntime.so /data/yolo-master-edge/third_party/ncnn/lib/libncnn.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_core.so.4.5.4d /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/11/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
